action_choice_hints: Whether the action cell contains a token with a special role distinct from empty or static background.
If the action cell is in the same row or column as a token with a unique control role.
Whether the action cell is the only cell of its type in the grid.
If the action cell is adjacent (orthogonally or diagonally) to a token with a related role.
Whether the action cell is within a contiguous segment of non-empty cells.
If the action cell is the nearest cell with a particular role to the grid boundary.
Whether the action cell is in a region (e.g., top or bottom band) containing a specific token type.
If the action cell is the first encountered cell with a given role along a direction from a reference token.
Whether the action cell is blocked by an obstacle before reaching a boundary in a given direction.
If the action cell is the only candidate in its row or column that satisfies a certain property.
Whether the action cell is part of a pair or group of cells with matching roles.
If the action cell is separated from other candidate cells by a run of empty or static cells.
Whether the action cell is at a fixed distance from a token with a control role.
If the action cell is in a position that would enable a transition for a moving token.
Whether the action cell is in a region with no obstacles between it and a reference token.
If the action cell is the only cell in a contiguous run of a certain length.
transition_hints: Selecting a cell containing a moving token causes that token to change its state or highlight.
Choosing a cell with a control role may result in a role swap or highlight between tokens.
Selecting a cell with a special role can cause a previously highlighted token to revert to its base state.
Action on a cell may cause a token to move to a new location, leaving its previous cell empty.
Selecting a cell adjacent to a highlighted token can transfer the highlight to the new cell.
Choosing a cell with a unique role may cause all other tokens of that role to lose their special state.
Action on a cell may result in a token being removed from the grid.
Selecting a cell may cause a token to appear in a previously empty cell.
Choosing a cell may cause a token to change its role or type.
Action on a cell may cause a contiguous run of tokens to be updated simultaneously.
Selecting a cell may cause a token to become highlighted if it was not previously.
Action on a cell may cause a token to lose its highlight if it was previously highlighted.

diversity_requirements: Include templates that capture both local (adjacency, within 1-2 steps) and global (row/column, region) relations.
Ensure templates cover both single-cell and multi-cell (group, run, segment) patterns.
placeholder_usage_limits: Limit the number of templates with more than two placeholders to avoid combinatorial explosion.
Restrict templates that require enumeration over all possible directions to a maximum of two per template.
avoidances: Avoid templates that match only on exact coordinates or specific grid positions.
Do not generate templates that rely solely on the presence of a token type without considering spatial relations.
